title: Phase 1A: Project scaffolding and dependency installation
description: Initialize Next.js 14+ with App Router and TypeScript strict mode. Install all project dependencies including Prisma, NextAuth, Socket.io, Zod, react-hook-form, Recharts, Leaflet, Twilio, Resend, jsPDF, and more.
steps: Initialize Next.js 14+ project with App Router and TypeScript strict
Configure tsconfig.json with strict mode, path aliases, and required compiler options
Install core dependencies: prisma, @prisma/client, next-auth, socket.io, socket.io-client
Install UI: recharts, leaflet, react-leaflet, @react-pdf/renderer, jspdf
